author: vvo
subject: v0.8.1
body: ## [0.8.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1) (2015-11-04) ### Bug Fixes * **hierarchicalMenu:** handle cases where no results after a search ([0a1d0ac](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0a1d0ac)), closes [#385](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/385) ### Features * **build:** allow building React based custom widgets ([cfbbfe4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/cfbbfe4)), closes [#373](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/373)
